Appearance
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This is a sortable list of games for the ZX Spectrum home computer. There are currently 1996 games in this incomplete list.

According to the 90th issue of GamesMaster, the ten best games released were (in descending order) Head Over Heels, Jet Set Willy, Skool Daze, Renegade, R-Type, Knight Lore, Dizzy, The Hobbit, The Way of the Exploding Fist, and Match Day II.[1]


  • 1982
  • 1983
  • 1984
  • 1985
  • 1986
  • 1987
  • 1988
  • 1989
  • 1990
  • 1990
  • 1991
  • 1992
  • 1993
  • 1994
  • 2020
  • 2024
  • References
  • External links
